languages.text: "В ловушке? Несомненно, Инквизиция — опасный враг. Однако этот враг все еще стоит на моей земле, в моем протекторате. Диодас обречен на поражение".
"A trap? The Inquisition is a dangerous foe, no doubt about that. Nevertheless, this foe still stands on my land, in my protectorate. Diodas is doomed to failure."
languages.original_text: "В ловушке? Несомненно, Инквизиция — опасный враг. Однако этот враг все еще стоит на моей земле, в моем протекторате. Диодас обречен на поражение".

traits.locale_text: "A trap? The Inquisition is a dangerous foe, no doubt about that. Nevertheless, this foe still stands on my land, in my protectorate. Diodas is doomed to failure."
"A trap? The Inquisition is a dangerous foe, no doubt about that. Nevertheless, this foe still stands on my land, in my protectorate. Diodas is doomed to failure."
"A trap? The Inquisition is a dangerous foe, no doubt about that. Nevertheless, this foe still stands on my land, in my protectorate. Diodas is doomed to failure."

languages.text: “圈套？审判庭确实是很危险的对手，这点毋庸置疑。但再怎么说，这个敌人还站在我的地盘上，在我的属地里。狄奥达斯注定铩羽而归。”
languages.original_text: "A trap? The Inquisition is a dangerous foe, no doubt about that. Nevertheless, this foe still stands on my land, in my protectorate. Diodas is doomed to failure."

traits.locale_text: “圈套？审判庭确实是很危险的对手，这点毋庸置疑。但再怎么说，这个敌人还站在我的地盘上，在我的属地里。狄奥达斯注定铩羽而归。”

languages.text: « Un piège ? L'Inquisition est un dangereux adversaire, aucun doute là-dessus, mais tant qu'il se trouve sur mon territoire, au sein de mon protectorat, les menées de Diodas sont vouées à l'échec. »
languages.original_text: "A trap? The Inquisition is a dangerous foe, no doubt about that. Nevertheless, this foe still stands on my land, in my protectorate. Diodas is doomed to failure."

traits.locale_text: « Un piège ? L'Inquisition est un dangereux adversaire, aucun doute là-dessus, mais tant qu'il se trouve sur mon territoire, au sein de mon protectorat, les menées de Diodas sont vouées à l'échec. »

languages.text: "Tuzak mı? Engizisyon'un tehlikeli bir düşman olduğuna zerre şüphe yok. Ancak bu düşman hâlâ benim topraklarımda, benim protektoramda. Diodas'ın başarısızlığı kaçınılmaz."
languages.original_text: "A trap? The Inquisition is a dangerous foe, no doubt about that. Nevertheless, this foe still stands on my land, in my protectorate. Diodas is doomed to failure."

traits.locale_text: "Tuzak mı? Engizisyon'un tehlikeli bir düşman olduğuna zerre şüphe yok. Ancak bu düşman hâlâ benim topraklarımda, benim protektoramda. Diodas'ın başarısızlığı kaçınılmaz."

languages.text: «¿Una trampa? La Inquisición es un enemigo peligroso, desde luego. Sin embargo, el enemigo está en mis tierras. En mi protectorado. Diodas está abocado al fracaso».
languages.original_text: "A trap? The Inquisition is a dangerous foe, no doubt about that. Nevertheless, this foe still stands on my land, in my protectorate. Diodas is doomed to failure."

traits.locale_text: «¿Una trampa? La Inquisición es un enemigo peligroso, desde luego. Sin embargo, el enemigo está en mis tierras. En mi protectorado. Diodas está abocado al fracaso».

languages.text: "Eine Falle? Die Inquisition ist ein gefährlicher Feind, daran besteht kein Zweifel. Dennoch steht dieser Feind auf meinem Land, in meinem Protektorat. Diodas wird unweigerlich scheitern."
languages.original_text: "A trap? The Inquisition is a dangerous foe, no doubt about that. Nevertheless, this foe still stands on my land, in my protectorate. Diodas is doomed to failure."

traits.locale_text: "Eine Falle? Die Inquisition ist ein gefährlicher Feind, daran besteht kein Zweifel. Dennoch steht dieser Feind auf meinem Land, in meinem Protektorat. Diodas wird unweigerlich scheitern."

languages.text: 「罠か？宗教裁判所は恐ろしい敵だ。だが、この敵は私の領土、私の保護下にいる。ディオダスは失敗に終わるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "A trap? The Inquisition is a dangerous foe, no doubt about that. Nevertheless, this foe still stands on my land, in my protectorate. Diodas is doomed to failure."

traits.locale_text: 「罠か？宗教裁判所は恐ろしい敵だ。だが、この敵は私の領土、私の保護下にいる。ディオダスは失敗に終わるだろう。」
